questions.q: On April 9, 2026, Netflix officially opened a new 110,000-square-foot animation studio in which Canadian city?
questions.correctText: Netflix officially opened a new 110,000-square-foot animation studio in Vancouver on April 9, 2026.

questions.q: What Canadian bank announced on April 9, 2026, its plan to launch a growth fund to invest up to $1 billion in Canadian companies?
questions.correctText: On April 9, 2026, RBC announced its plan to launch a growth fund to invest up to $1 billion in Canadian companies.

questions.q: Which Canadian province is currently facing a court challenge from First Nations, including Sturgeon Lake Cree Nation, seeking to block a separatist referendum, as reported on April 9, 2026?
questions.correctText: Alberta is currently facing a court challenge from First Nations, including Sturgeon Lake Cree Nation, seeking to block a separatist referendum, citing treaty infringement.

questions.q: According to a poll reported in early April 2026, a majority of Canadians are open to exploring the idea of joining which international political and economic bloc?
questions.correctText: A poll reported in early April 2026 suggested that a majority of Canadians are open to exploring the idea of joining the European Union.

questions.q: On April 7/8, 2026, Conservative MP Marilyn Gladu notably crossed the floor to join which political party, led by Prime Minister Mark Carney?
questions.correctText: Conservative MP Marilyn Gladu crossed the floor to join the Liberal Party, led by Prime Minister Mark Carney, on April 7 or 8, 2026.
